rounds: Necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers to Lavendra — full picture, his people, no armour. That one's his. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was a deliberate choice, not an accident. But the poncho stayed on at Balmoral and the swim group had him wanting to hide his toes — joy police took those rounds. The knit cardigan challenge from week one? Wore it to Bold & Beautiful. That one's banked.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — and loudest when the routine makes the choice for him before he even notices.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
